name: Wind Carry
description: Message caught by wind and carried away

simple: message caught by strong wind and carried swiftly away
standard: message caught by strong wind and carried swiftly away
leaf letter lifted by gust and sailing over trees
dandelion seeds released into purposeful carrying breeze
detailed: message caught by strong wind and carried swiftly away
leaf letter lifted by gust and sailing over trees
dandelion seeds released into purposeful carrying breeze
paper caught in updraft and spiraling higher
autumn wind snatching sound and running with it
